name: mistakebook-skills
description: 错题集 Skill。识别用户进入纠错状态，强制执行“纠错-确认-归档-记忆刷新”闭环，并在多次纠错仍失败时自动升级到飞升模式（Ascended Mode）。

plugins.name: mistakebook
plugins.description: 错题集 Skill for Claude-style plugin hosts. Includes automatic correction detection hooks, Ascended Mode escalation, session restore, manual /mistakebook and /ascended routing, detailed case archiving, and project/global memory refresh.
